include.name: test when merchant has send otp v5 flag enabled and autoReadHash is passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag enabled and autoReadHash is not passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag disabled and autoReadHash is passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag disabled and autoReadHash is not passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag enabled and autoReadHash is passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag enabled and autoReadHash is not passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag disabled and autoReadHash is passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag disabled and autoReadHash is not passed
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag enabled and requestType is NATIVE_SUBSCRIPTION
test when merchant has send otp v5 flag disabled and requestType is NATIVE_SUBSCRIPTION
